title: Promptų anatomija – SOT and module registry
description: Single registry for modules, SOT paths, gating, and next-step routing. Architektūra A: full authoring SOT in src/data/modules.json; core 1-6 (VITE_MVP_MODE=1) and production 1-9 (VITE_MAX_BUILD_MODULE=9) runtime profiles.

moduliai_1_3.description: Content truth for Moduliai 1–3 (6 Blokų, Žinių Patikrinimas, Praktinis Pritaikymas)

moduliai_4_6.description: Content truth for Moduliai 4–6 (Konteksto inžinerija, Prezentacijos sprintas, Projekto kūrimas)

moduliai_7_9.description: Content truth for Moduliai 7–9 (Duomenų analizės kelias: teorija, testas, finalinis projektas)

modulio_atpazinimas.description: Where 'Modulis 1'…'Modulis 6' and skaidrė numbers (e.g. 4.1–4.7) are defined to avoid confusion

m4_sk_53_5_news_portal.description: M4 sk. 53.5 news-portal editorial scroll; beat diagrams PORTAL_BEAT_DIAGRAMS.md; improvement guide PORTAL_2_1_IMPROVEMENT_GUIDE.md (session retrospective / UI audit → docs/archive/development/)

moduliai_10_12.description: Content truth for Moduliai 10–12 (Agentų inžinerija); includes §3b1 slide 10.26 human-control lab

m79_patch_registry.description: M7-M9 idempotent patch scripts registry (incl. patch-m79-plain-w4-w5); EN overlay full-section mirror rule; operational SOT for UX polish + A-C residual

docs_maintenance.description: Long-term documentation governance: layers, dual SOT, Feature Doc Contract, release sync cadence

teaching_elements_registry.description: Master teaching elements registry (diagrams, labs, embeds, tables, slide types); brandą 0–4; overlay teaching-elements-overlay.json; audit:teaching-elements

teaching_elements_overlay.description: Curated Pattern / Shell / maturity per elementId; validated by scripts/audit-teaching-elements.mjs

diagramu_m7_m12_registry.description: M7–M12 image-key satellite registry (Pattern + Shell Y/N); detail under TEACHING_ELEMENTS_REGISTRY

diagramu_m13_m15_registry.description: M13–15 image-key satellite registry (m13_*, m15_*, turinio_workflow)

diagramu_m1_m9_auditas.description: Rubric + historical M1–9 smoke; primary live inventory = teaching_elements_registry / teaching_elements_overlay; slide IDs may lag

m10_human_control_lab.description: 10.26 human-control lab: getRiskStripItems + recommendMode; labels m10HumanControlContent.ts; tokens m10HumanControlLabTokens.ts; Block M10HumanControlSimulatorBlock (W1.1 risk strip, CopyButton artefact); SCHEME §2.2c / GOLDEN §3.1c

m1012HandoutContent.role: M10-12 Agent path PDF handout content

m1315HandoutContent.role: M13-15 Content path PDF handout content

iconRegistry.description: Lucide icon keys for slide JSON (icon, iconKey) and module identity; CI gate on modules.json icon fields
